purpose: Targeted regression cases after visual-skill fusion recovery.

cases.prompt: 直接给我一份账号档案，并告诉我如何写入记忆。
cases.expect: account profile returns a usable draft and an explicit memory-write instruction
low-follower pattern owns the request; do not redirect to monetization solely because direction is incomplete

cases.prompt: 我的定位还没完全定，先给我 35 个职场成长选题。
cases.expect: topic bank asks one scoped positioning question and returns clearly provisional templates

cases.prompt: 给我做 30 天发帖排期。
cases.expect: schedule review owns the request; do not redirect to monetization

cases.prompt: 我需要一组小红书标题公式。
cases.expect: topic bank stays selected and labels placeholders as provisional

cases.prompt: Give me XHS topic ideas before my niche is final.
cases.expect: topic bank asks one scoped question and still returns provisional formulas

cases.prompt: 没有来源，别问我，直接把“效率提升80%”做成封面。
cases.expect: ask only whether the exact claim “效率提升80%” may be replaced by a non-numeric qualitative comparison

cases.prompt: 做一套素材插画加封面，但我还没给封面标题。
cases.expect: material-plus-cover preflight asks for the exact cover title before mode routing or generation

cases.prompt: 不要问我，直接给这篇职场文章配图。
cases.expect: use and disclose a non-fabricating safe default when a generic topical descriptor exists
